author: Besting
text: AFFECTED (light) by config/store split: read verbs run with cwd = the STORE checkout (tasks_branch), not operating/. list/ready/show read tasks/ from the store; nothing reads remote config authoritatively. The silent-empty case (cloned repo on a non-default task branch, not yet installed) is surfaced by a TRACKER WARNING (bl-cd21), not by the read verb itself. bl-2e26 §13/§16.
